The results of the molecular genetic analyses presented in the protologue suggest that it is genetically most similar to Uvaria species and quite different from the Dasymaschalon sequences included in the study. It is therefore unclear to which genus Dasymaschalon leilamericanum belongs or, in fact, if it merits taxonomic recognition. 99m.
